panels.title: docs: session log 2026-05-05
panels.scene: A single villager stands in front of a dusty scroll, now perfectly aligned and legible. They're weeping tears of joy. The knight stands nearby, looking indifferent.

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Fixed a typo in the documentation.

panels.title: docs: session log 2026-05-05
panels.scene: Two scribes are arguing vehemently over an illegible character in a large tome. The knight calmly points to the correct character with his sword. The scribes immediately faint from relief.

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It's a zero. I clarified it.

panels.title: docs: session log 2026-05-05
panels.scene: A royal historian is about to throw themself off a balcony in despair while holding an ancient record. The knight gently takes the record and adds a comma. The historian is saved.

bubbles.speaker: Historian
bubbles.text: I could not decipher the meaning!

panels.title: 1 commit. 1 typo fixed. Kingdom saved.
panels.scene: The knight stands wearily in the town square. A small child offers him a crudely drawn picture of a comma. In the background, villagers are erecting a miniature statue of a scroll.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We shall forever celebrate the Day of Clarification!
